_status: HARVESTED 2026-06-17 — DFPT el-ph DONE on summer FREE pool (915G disk; vast 40G ruled out by el-ph scratch >40G/q). Run survived ~6 summer reboots via QE recover=.true. self-heal (scripts/scratch/laos3si2_vast/summer_q4_resume.sh). VERDICT: dynamically UNSTABLE at 2x2x2 q -> lambda/Tc UNTRUSTWORTHY as absolute (d6 gate), AND a WEAKER el-ph coupler than LaRu3Si2 at matched broadening.
structure: CeCo3B2-type Os-kagome, hexagonal P6/mmm (No.191), ibrav=4, nat=6 ntyp=3 (La 1a triangular z=0; Os 3g KAGOME z=1/2; Si 2c honeycomb z=0). Os 5d^7 isoelectronic to Ru 4d^7 (LaRu3Si2 sibling). 2nd flat-band-at-E_F winner.
method: QE 7.5 DFPT (ph.x) electron_phonon='simple' double-delta a2F; PBE NC ONCV; ecutwfc=90 ecutrho=360 Ry; MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry; nspin=1 (NM ground state, m=0, dE=+0.089). Os mass=190.23. Same 2x2x2 q / 16^3 fine k as LaRu3Si2 for head-to-head.
qmesh: 2x2x2 (ldisp, Gamma-centered irreducible set, 4 irreducible q; star multiplicities w=[1,1,3,3], total=8)

per_q.dyn1_Gamma_w1: 5/18 imaginary, min -92.1 cm-1 (incl non-acoustic soft modes at Gamma)

stability.detail: Weighted imaginary-mode count = 5*1+4*1+3*3+2*3 = 24 mode-q instances imaginary (vs LaRu3Si2 11 raw / 6 genuine non-Gamma). Even Gamma carries 5 imaginary modes. The Os-kagome lattice at 2x2x2 is MORE softened than Ru. Per-mode lambda(nu)<0 for every imaginary mode (signature of imaginary omega^2 in lambda=gamma/(pi N(Ef) omega^2)).

head_to_head_MATCHED_sigma_0p05_Ry.note: LaRu3Si2's canonical lambda=1.64 was assembled at el_ph index 10 = 0.050 Ry (laru3si2_dft_elph.json evidence_cmd n==10). FAIR comparison uses the SAME broadening for BOTH.
head_to_head_MATCHED_sigma_0p05_Ry.verdict: At matched sigma=0.05 Ry, LaOs3Si2 (Os 5d) is a WEAKER el-ph coupler than LaRu3Si2 (Ru 4d): lambda 0.81 vs 1.64, Tc(phys) 4.3-5.3K vs 6.4-7.0K. Os has HIGHER omega_log (109 vs 56 K) but the larger value is partly an artifact of excluding MORE soft modes (24 vs 6). Heavier Os does not stiffen the el-ph; the 4d->5d substitution REDUCES the flat-band-driven coupling.

compare_laru3si2: head-to-head at SAME 2x2x2 q / 16^3 k: flat-band-at-E_F gives large el-ph drive in BOTH siblings, but Ru (4d) > Os (5d) at matched broadening. Os trades coupling for stiffer phonons, net LOWER Tc.
lambda_flatband_question: flat-band -> large el-ph drive is present in BOTH siblings (both physical lambda > 0.8 with large N(Ef)~40), but Os WEAKENS it relative to Ru at matched broadening. The flat-band->lambda hypothesis is SUPPORTED qualitatively (kagome flat band boosts el-ph) but the 4d Ru is the stronger coupler. Both lattices are dynamically unstable at 2x2x2 (Os more so), so absolute numbers are soft upper bounds (d6).
validation_verdict: 🔴 DYNAMICALLY UNSTABLE at 2x2x2 (24 weighted imaginary modes, more than LaRu3Si2) -> absolute lambda/Tc UNTRUSTWORTHY (d6). Head-to-head (matched sigma=0.05): LaOs3Si2 LOSES to LaRu3Si2 (lambda 0.81 vs 1.64, Tc 4-5K vs 7K). Os substitution does NOT enhance the flat-band superconductor. REQUIRES 4x4x4 q to decide artifact-vs-CDW for both, but the relative ranking (Ru > Os) holds at fixed grid+broadening.
engine: QE 7.5 ph.x (DFPT |g|, electron_phonon='simple') + direct Allen-Dynes assembly (lambda.x-equivalent, q-star weighted, imaginary dropped). assembler = scripts/scratch/laos3si2_vast/harvest/harvest_lambda_tc.py
pod: summer FREE pool (915G disk, QE micromamba env). Survived ~6 reboots (concurrent RT-NATIVE load) via QE recover self-heal. raw harvest tar = scripts/scratch/laos3si2_vast/harvest/laos3si2_elph_harvest.tgz
evidence_cmd: python3 scripts/scratch/laos3si2_vast/harvest/harvest_lambda_tc.py (parses the 4 dyn.elph + 4 dyn files in the harvest tar)
caveats: DYNAMICALLY UNSTABLE at 2x2x2 (d6): 24 weighted imaginary modes (more than LaRu3Si2's 6 genuine) -> absolute Tc untrustworthy; soft upper bound only.

head-to-head MUST be at matched broadening: at sigma=0.05 Ry (LaRu3Si2's reference) LaOs3Si2 lambda=0.81 < LaRu3Si2 1.64 -> Os is the WEAKER coupler. A mismatched-broadening read (LaOs 0.02 vs LaRu 0.05) falsely inverts this.
LaOs3Si2 higher omega_log (109 vs 56 K) is partly an artifact of dropping MORE soft modes (24 vs 6), not a genuine phonon-hardening advantage.
honest (c9/d6): the Ru>Os ranking at fixed grid+broadening is the robust finding; absolute Tc for either needs 4x4x4 q to settle artifact-vs-CDW.
